result.preview: [{"name": "Widows Peak Salon", "average_rating": 4.8571428571}, {"name": "City Textile", "average_rating": 4.5}, {"name": "Nobel Textile Co", "average_rating": 4.2857142857}, {"name": "San Soo Dang", "average_rating": 4.2777777778}, {"name": "Nova Fabrics", "average_rating": 3.3333333333}]

args.code:
import pandas as pd

business_data = locals()['var_function-call-17226943478158212202']
review_data = locals()['var_function-call-11304306735181832826']

df_business = pd.DataFrame(business_data)
df_review = pd.DataFrame(review_data)
df_review['rating'] = pd.to_numeric(df_review['rating'])

average_ratings = df_review.groupby('gmap_id')['rating'].mean().reset_index()
average_ratings.rename(columns={'rating': 'average_rating'}, inplace=True)

merged_df = pd.merge(df_business, average_ratings, on='gmap_id')
sorted_df = merged_df.sort_values(by='average_rating', ascending=False)

top_5_businesses = sorted_df.head(5)

result = top_5_businesses[['name', 'average_rating']].to_json(orient='records')

print('__RESULT__:')
print(result)

import pandas as pd

business_data = locals()['var_function-call-17226943478158212202']
review_data = locals()['var_function-call-11304306735181832826']

df_business = pd.DataFrame(business_data)
df_review = pd.DataFrame(review_data)
df_review['rating'] = pd.to_numeric(df_review['rating'])

average_ratings = df_review.groupby('gmap_id')['rating'].mean().reset_index()
average_ratings.rename(columns={'rating': 'average_rating'}, inplace=True)

merged_df = pd.merge(df_business, average_ratings, on='gmap_id')
sorted_df = merged_df.sort_values(by='average_rating', ascending=False)

top_5_businesses = sorted_df.head(5)

result = top_5_businesses[['name', 'average_rating']].to_json(orient='records')

print('__RESULT__:')
print(result)
